moments.title: World Cup Final Tonight
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final kicks off tonight at 8pm UK time from MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, available live on BBC One and ITV1.

angles.name: Kick-off excitement
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is here! Who are you backing to lift the World Cup trophy tonight? Kick-off at 8pm.

angles.name: Dual channel coverage
angles.copy: Two channels, one massive match! Watch the World Cup final live on BBC One or ITV1 from 7pm. Get your snacks ready!

moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, marking the end of one of golf's four annual majors.

angles.name: Final day drama
angles.copy: It's the final day of The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale! Who will be crowned Champion Golfer of the Year?

angles.name: Golf's biggest stage
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is on the line! All eyes are on Royal Birkdale as the 154th Open Championship wraps up today.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest music event, concludes its two-day run today at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Festival finale
angles.copy: It's the last day of Splendour Festival 2026! Who caught the action at Wollaton Hall this weekend?

angles.name: Nottingham's big weekend
angles.copy: Nottingham's been buzzing with Splendour Festival! What were your highlights from the stages today?

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen track featuring his legendary guitar work?

angles.name: Guitar hero
angles.copy: 79 years young and still a guitar hero! Celebrating Brian May's birthday today. From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', his riffs are unforgettable.

moments.title: Fred again.. turns 33
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning UK producer and DJ Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday today.

angles.name: Dance music star birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again..! What's your go-to track from the producer/DJ?

angles.name: UK talent
angles.copy: Celebrating UK dance music talent today! Fred again.. turns 33. His sets and productions have defined a sound.

moments.title: Gabrielle turns 57
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Gabrielle, known for hits like 'Dreams' and 'Rise', celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: Soulful singer's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the wonderful Gabrielle! Which of her timeless tunes is your favourite?

angles.name: UK R&B icon
angles.copy: From 'Dreams' to 'Sunshine', Gabrielle has given us so many classics. Wishing her a very happy 57th birthday!

moments.title: Love Island Final Next Week
moments.blurb: The grand final of Love Island 2026 is officially set for Monday, July 27th, at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, where the winning couple will be crowned.

angles.name: Countdown to the final
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! Just over a week until the Love Island 2026 final. Who are your predictions for the winning couple?

angles.name: Reality TV showdown
angles.copy: Get ready for the ultimate reality TV showdown! The Love Island final is Monday 27th July. Will your favourite couple make it?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from Thursday 23rd to Sunday 26th July 2026, celebrating 20 years of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Festival week starts
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Kicking off on Thursday in Suffolk. Who's heading to Henham Park for 20 years of music and arts?

angles.name: Suffolk's big weekend
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival brings four days of incredible live acts, comedy, and more from Thursday. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Big Love Festival This July
moments.blurb: South Wales hosts the Big Love Festival this July, a 4-day music event celebrating its 10th year in the countryside near Bristol and Cardiff.

angles.name: South Wales festival
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is happening this July in South Wales! Get ready for 4 days of music, circus, and cabaret. Who's joining the celebration?

angles.name: Local festival vibe
angles.copy: Celebrating 10 years of Big Love in South Wales! A small festival with a big heart, bringing bands and DJs to the countryside this month.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are starting for many children across England (July 23rd) and Northern Ireland (July 28th) this week.

angles.name: School's out for summer
angles.copy: Freedom! For many, school's officially out for summer this week. What are your big plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family fun ahead
angles.copy: The summer holidays are kicking off for schools in England and Northern Ireland this week! Time for family adventures and sunshine.

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 20th. Born in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar legend birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only Carlos Santana turns 79! Get ready to crank up some classic guitar riffs.

angles.name: Santana's influence
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana for tomorrow! His influence on rock and Latin music is immense.

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd. Born in 1947.

angles.name: Eagles legend birthday
angles.copy: Hotel California and so much more! Don Henley of The Eagles turns 79 on Wednesday. What's your top Henley track?

angles.name: Voice of a generation
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the unmistakable voice of Don Henley this Wednesday! A true rock icon.

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses lead guitarist Slash, known for his iconic top hat and blistering solos, celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd. Born in 1965.

angles.name: Rock god birthday
angles.copy: Welcome to the jungle! Slash turns 61 on Thursday. What's your favourite Guns N' Roses guitar solo?

angles.name: Guitar icon
angles.copy: That top hat, those riffs! Happy 61st birthday to the legendary Slash this Thursday. Still shredding after all these years!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th. Born in 1969.

angles.name: J.Lo's birthday bash
angles.copy: It's J.Lo's birthday on Friday! Jennifer Lopez turns 57. What's your favourite hit from the multi-talented superstar?

angles.name: Global icon
angles.copy: Still Jenny from the Block! Wishing Jennifer Lopez a very happy 57th birthday this Friday. A true force in music and film.

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th. Born in 1943.

angles.name: Rock royalty birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

angles.name: Still rolling
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Sunday! Still proving that rock 'n' roll never gets old.
